title: ophrys ferrum-equinum subsp. lesbis
intro: Ophrys ferrum-equinum subsp. lesbis, also known as the Greek bee orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to Greece. The Greek bee orchid is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, with its roots and leaves containing compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an antiseptic agent. The Greek bee orchid can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
